issue_summary: MultiFields.getIndexedFields optimize to not call getMergedFieldInfos
javadoc_before:
/** Call this to get the (merged) FieldInfos representing the * set of indexed fields only for a composite reader. *

* NOTE: the returned field numbers will likely not * correspond to the actual field numbers in the underlying * readers, and codec metadata ({@link FieldInfo#getAttribute(String)} * will be unavailable. */
javadoc_after: /** Returns a set of names of fields that have a terms index.  The order is undefined. */
